FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Labor Dispute
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Workers at several of your settlements are demanding better conditions and fairer treatment. Tensions are rising, and production is already slowing as workers engage in deliberate work slowdowns. You need to address this before it escalates further.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Sit down with their representatives. Let's find a compromise.
This is insubordination. Arrest the ringleaders and get everyone back to work.
They have a point. Grant their demands in full.
Bring in outside workers to replace the troublemakers.
Recognize their union. Our workers are our wealth — what is good for them is good for us all.
Workers are free agents. Those who can't accept our terms are free to seek their fortune elsewhere.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Negotiated Settlement
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: After tense but productive talks, you reach a compromise. Workers return to their posts, satisfied that their voices were heard. The agreement includes modest improvements to working conditions that permanently increase labor costs — but unrest dissolves.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Order Restored
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Guards round up the organizers and make an example of them. Workers grudgingly return to their stations, but fear replaces cooperation.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Demands Met
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The workers are thrilled — better pay, shorter hours, improved conditions. Morale soars and the settlements buzz with renewed enthusiasm. The treasury takes a hit from the increased costs, but a content workforce is a productive one.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Workers Replaced
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Outside laborers are brought in to replace the dissatisfied workers. The transition is messy; longtime residents are bitter about being replaced, and loyalty takes a serious hit. But the newcomers are grateful for the opportunity and the settlement's capacity grows.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Union Recognized
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: You sit with the workers not as supplicants, but as partners. The union is formally recognized, and a tide of solidarity sweeps the settlements — what is won for one is won for all. Costs rise modestly, but the bond between your people and your {FACTION_TITLE} has rarely been stronger.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Free Market of Labor
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: You make no threats and offer no concessions — those who cannot abide the terms are simply free to leave, and many do. Eager newcomers take their place almost overnight, drawn by the promise of opportunity. The churn ruffles a few feathers, but your people expect nothing less than a free hand to choose their own path.
